description: One short doc with one explicit date and one fact
user_request: What did Adam say about the EK AIO cooler?

documents.text: Adam: The EK 360 AIO cooler is leaking after 14 months. RMA request sent.

description: Two docs from different days; both dates must surface

documents.text: Adam: koboldcpp is silently truncating context above 32k tokens on the 24GB card.
Adam: Surface laptop won't boot after the firmware update; SMC reset did not help.

description: Date appears only in the prose of the document, not as metadata
user_request: What happened with the Discord rate limit?

documents.text: On 2026-02-20 the dispatcher hit the Discord rate limit twice in a row at 18:04 UTC.
